channel.title: Posts on MJ's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on MJ's blog

item.title: Network Controllability
item.description: Laplacian matrix \(L = D - A\) , where \(L\) is laplacian matrix, \(D\) is Degree matrix and \(A\) is the adjacency matrix.

item.title: Brief Explanations of Network's Various Properties
item.description: [This Article is not yet completed.] Random networks Erdős and Rényi model contrived in 1960.

item.title: How to use BERT in python
item.description: [This article is not yet completed.] This article explains an “implementation” of BERT (Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers) in a nutshell.

item.title: How to use BERT in python
